chosen_action.title: Stop duplicate primary-repo-flat status-packet churn during active hold windows

why_this_action.summary: The current bottleneck is still Codeberg-flat primary-repo conversion, but the active hold window had started reusing the same primary-repo-flat status packet as if it were fresh work. Adding a fingerprint-based reuse guard is the highest-leverage truthful action available now because it removes fake packet-refresh churn without touching live measurement windows.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat and is still the primary success gate
distribution_lane_latest.json: the active lane is measurement_hold until 2026-05-28T09:12:15
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now handoff packet exists in the current review window
marketing_2026-05-28_034343_measurement_hold_follow_through.md: hold follow-through was still surfacing the primary-repo-flat status packet during cooldown

result.summary: Patched the primary-repo-flat status packet writer and manual-asset refresh path to reuse an unchanged status packet instead of rewriting it, added regression coverage, ran the full measurement-hold executor test suite, and refreshed today's shared status packet once so future hold-window passes can fail closed to the current truth.
